x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only. Tools map to the Open311-aligned OpenAPI operations and $ref the same object schemas. The submit tool revives the retired Open311 POST /requests.

server.name: io.nyc.311
server.title: NYC311
server.description: Agent-native access to NYC 311 — the catalog of service types, submitting and tracking service requests (Open311 GeoReport v2), responding agencies, and search over the city's flagship 311 dataset. Revives the open standard NYC let lapse.
server.instructions: find_service_types lists what can be reported (with SLAs). submit_service_request reports a 311 problem — it requires an api.nyc.gov key, mutates state, and should be confirmed with the user first (and needs an address + service code). check_request_status tracks a request. find_service_requests searches the historical/open record. get_agencies lists responding agencies.

tools.name: find_service_types
tools.title: Find Service Types
tools.description: List/search the 311 service (complaint) types, with SLAs and owning agency. Open311 GET Service List.

tools.name: get_service_definition
tools.title: Get Service Definition
tools.description: Get the attributes required to submit a given service type (dynamic form fields). Open311 GET Service Definition.

tools.name: submit_service_request
tools.title: Submit 311 Service Request
tools.description: Report a 311 problem (Open311 POST Service Request). Revives the retired write path. Requires an api.nyc.gov key and an address + service code. Mutates state — confirm details with the user first.

tools.name: check_request_status
tools.title: Check Request Status
tools.description: Track a 311 service request by id (status, resolution, agency). Open311 GET Service Request.

tools.name: find_service_requests
tools.title: Find Service Requests
tools.description: Search the 311 record by service type, status, date range, or borough (backed by the erm2-nwe9 open dataset).

tools.name: get_agencies
tools.title: Get Responding Agencies
tools.description: List the city agencies that resolve 311 requests and the service types they own.

x-agent-skills.note: Each tool maps to one of the ten NYC common government-process Agent Skills via x-agent-skill.
